content: HomeDirectoryHampshireHampshirePolice Station Representatives in HampshireFind accredited police station representatives covering all Hampshire Constabulary custody suites. Available 24/7 for immediate attendance at Southampton, Portsmouth, Basingstoke and across Hampshire.Search Hampshire RepsRegister as Hampshire Rep3+Registered Hampshire Representatives14+Hampshire Police Stations24/7Coverage AvailablePolice Station Representation in HampshireHampshire is one of England's largest counties, including the cities of Southampton and Portsmouth, with Hampshire Constabulary operating custody suites across the region including the Isle of Wight. Our directory connects you with experienced, accredited professionals.All representatives listed state they hold current PSRAS accreditation through the Law Society.
